steps.title: Pinpoint the task requirement
steps.content: The student wants to provide an example of Catlett's sculptures. The notes list two specific works: Mahalia (sculpture, 2002) and Paulina (print, 2009).

steps.title: Select the choice that fulfills it
steps.content:
Choice A provides Mahalia as a specific sculpture example with details from the notes (creator, date), fulfilling the task.

Choices B, C, and D respectively offer biography, a print instead of a sculpture, and general description—none provide a specific sculpture example.

This matches choice A — A is correct.
